kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Millpond, 5 coins, and 9 coins go with Beatrix, Matilda, and Wulfric, in some order.
Either Beatrix belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the Gate Ward belong to the Clothiers' Guild (but not both).
Weaver goes with exactly two of Matilda, Riverside, and 7 coins.
The artisan in Kingsford's levy is higher than both Wulfric and the Blacksmith.
Either Edmund belongs to the Clothiers' Guild or both members of the North Side belong to the Clothiers' Guild.
If 10 coins does not go with Carpenter, then Fletcher goes with Kingsford.
Exactly two of these are true: Aldric goes with Riverside; Wulfric goes with Carpenter; Tanner goes with Oldwall.
Exactly one of the artisan in Kingsford, the artisan in Riverside, and the artisan with 7 coins belongs to the Joiners' Guild.
The Weaver's levy is higher than both Aldric and the artisan in Eastcheap.
Between Aldric and Beatrix, one goes with Fletcher and the other with Tanner.
